modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to update name on credit card receipt.

full_description_text: The user is trying to change the name on their credit card receipt. This issue arose while using the Verifone VX520 credit card reader. There seems to be a problem with the system that prevents the update from being processed correctly.
short_description: Unable to update name on credit card receipt.
description: The user is trying to change the name on their credit card receipt. This issue arose while using the Verifone VX520 credit card reader. There seems to be a problem with the system that prevents the update from being processed correctly.
